---
title: "LibreOffice fullscreen mode still shows menu bar"
date: 2020-10-12
forum: General Help
---

### Post by shloz on 2020-10-12
Like the title says I still have the menu bar bar showing in LibreOffice fullscreen mode. This isn't how it's supposed to work. Pease help me fix this.
I'm running Lubuntu 20.04 and LibreOffice Version: 6.4.6.2 Build ID: 1:6.4.6-0ubuntu0.20.04.1
I tried it with the LibreOffice AppImage version 7 and it has the same issue, I think something in LXQT or OpenBox needs to be adjusted I just can't figure it out...
Thanks, Shloz
